programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Day: Crime thriller starring Dylan Neal. After buying a rare cookery book, chef Henry finds himself at the centre of a murder mystery. Can the answers be found within the book itself? (2020)
Thriller with Tricia Helfer. After her jailed brother sends a cryptic message, a woman uncovers a trail to stolen millions - but deadly crooks are close behind, and they'll kill for the cash. (2010)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
When fashion designer Maggie London returns to her hometown for the funeral of a friend, she soon realises there have a been a series of 'accidental' deaths in the town. Julie Benz stars. (2006)
The Signing: Can Sue convince a car thief to help her catch his dangerous accomplice, a suspected armed robber? Meanwhile, the team await the arrival of their new supervisor.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
FMurder: Dr Sloan investigates the murder of a controversial radio shock-jock, killed by electrocution. Will he be able to prove that his initial suspicions are correct?
Reap What You Sew: There's a long list of suspects when a family friend is murdered, but can librarian super sleuth Aurora pin down the truth? (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Crime mystery with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu as a culinary expert and a no-nonsense detective team up to investigate a shocking crime at a five-star restaurant. (2015)

Jenny is unhappy when her mum Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband, Brett. When Laura ends up in a coma, Jenny's suspicions of Brett deepen. Starring Jillian Murray. (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Thriller with Mia Topalian. Unable to find a management job, Jamie becomes a nanny for a charismatic tycoon. But rejecting his advances will put her - like those before her - in mortal danger. (2020)
Bombs Away: Sue returns from agent training to investigate a bomb threat at an oil refinery. Will Sue and Jack be able to prove the legitimacy of the threat in time?

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Left-Handed Murder: Dr Sloan investigates the death of his friend whose arm is found in the stomach of a shark. Developments in the case leaves three women feeling shocked and bewildered.
...Deceit: Thriller with Jesse Metcalfe. A missing family heirloom is the key to finding the truth as former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr Zee Madieras to track down a murderer. (2020)
A Murderous Muse: Can Jessica prove whether the estranged father of a music prodigy is innocent of murdering his daughter's controlling mentor?
Wheel Of Death: The carnival comes to Cabot Cove, accompanied by a major crime spree within the town. Meanwhile, Sheriff Metzger has an awkward encounter with his college sweetheart.
A Nest Of Vipers: Jessica researches her latest book at a Californian zoo. Can she determine whether a deadly snake bite was an unfortunate incident or a meticulously planned murder?
Amsterdam Kill: Jessica investigates the disappearance of her friend during a trip to Amsterdam. Can she find her friend and a murderer?
To Kill A Legend: Will a letter, allegedly written by George Washington, damage the reputation of a Cabot Cove icon and lead to the murder of a documentary filmmaker?
Death In Hawaii: Jessica travels to Hawaii for a relaxing break but is soon drawn into an investigation surrounding the disappearance of her friend's son.
Dear Deadly: Can Jessica help to protect a San Francisco newspaper columnist after an attempt is made on her life?
Murder Channel: Are Jessica's neighbours watching a new television show, or are they unknowingly viewing a real-life murder taking place?
Fatal Paradise: Jessica travels to the idyllic Caribbean island of Martinique for a holiday. Can she help Chicago P.I, Charlie Garret, prove his innocence when he is accused of murder?
Crimson Harvest: Jessica visits Wine Country to attend the funeral of her friend's son, the heir to a struggling vineyard. Can she determine whether the murders of two men are linked?
...Last Scene Alive: Crime buff Aurora discovers she's the inspiration for a new film. But the plot thickens when the actress playing her is killed... (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Last Scene Alive: Crime buff Aurora discovers she's the inspiration for a new film. But the plot thickens when the actress playing her is killed... (2018)
...Impossible Dream: Heartwarming mystery starring Eric Mabius. The Postables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier in Afghanistan and reunite her with her family. (2015)
